column1: # Crop-residue supply model: which model crop produces which residue feed item
# the above-ground residue ratio (gross residue DM = slope * grain_DM + intercept
# with grain_DM in t/ha and intercept in kg/ha)

column2: the feed-usable fraction of gross residue). One row per model

column1: # crop; crops sharing a residue feed item repeat its parameters (FUE is required
# to be identical across rows of a feed item).
# cassava residues are the R_AG (above-ground residue) regressions in GLEAM 3.0
# groundnut and sweet-potato are absent from S.3.1; their ratios are from the
# fodder literature (see per-row source). FUE for the GLEAM-listed cereal
# residues is the GLEAM "all production systems" value (0.70); pulse (0.90) and
# banana (0.50) follow GLEAM; the added residues use feed-survey FUE (see source).
